message:
feat(tests): add setup-readiness integration tests without mock.module (bd-1vr1.6)

Route-level validation tests (install, verify) run without mocks.
Detection-dependent readiness tests skipped due to agent-detection
service using `command -v` (shell builtin unavailable in bun:test).
